title: Mag-Bind Blood & Tissue DNA HDQ 96 Kit Protocol
author: Opentrons
materials: Mag-Bind Blood & Tissue DNA HDQ 96 Kit

steps.title: This is a custom implementation of...
steps.instruction: This is a custom implementation of the Mag-Bind Blood and Tissue kit. Specify the starting sample volume, final elution volume, and number of samples, allowing the OT-2 to automate the procedure with minimal intervention to empty trash and/or refill tip racks as alerted. Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of samples`: Specify the number of samples this run (1-96 and divisible by 8, i.e. whole columns at a time). * `Initial Volume`: Specify starting volume of sample (ul). * `Elution Volume`: Specify elution volume (ul) into final plate. * `Flash on Robot Pause`: Specify whether the robot will flash on pause. This includes trash or tip rack notifications * `P300 Multi Channel Pipette Mount`: Specify whether the P300 multi channel pipette will be on the left or right mount. ---

steps.title: Binding buffer/bead mixture is vigorously mixed to disperse beads
steps.instruction: Binding buffer/bead mixture is vigorously mixed to disperse beads. This is repeated when a well is accessed for the first time, i.e. every 4th column

steps.title: Binding buffer is added to samples...
steps.instruction: Binding buffer is added to samples on deep well plate on the magnetic module.

steps.title: Magnetic module is engaged and incubated for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Magnetic module is engaged and incubated for 5 minutes

steps.title: Supernatant is removed and disposed of...
steps.instruction: Supernatant is removed and disposed of in waste container, slot 4. Tips are re-used for future supernatant removals in first tip rack, slot 1

steps.title: 600 uL of VHB buffer is...
steps.instruction: 600 uL of VHB buffer is added to each sample and mixed

steps.title: Magnetic module is engaged and incubated for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Magnetic module is engaged and incubated for 5 minutes

steps.title: Supernatant is removed and disposed of...
steps.instruction: Supernatant is removed and disposed of in waste container, slot 4

steps.title: Steps 6 through 8 are repeated...
steps.instruction: Steps 6 through 8 are repeated for a second VHB wash and supernatant removal

steps.title: 600 uL of SPM buffer diluted...
steps.instruction: 600 uL of SPM buffer diluted with ethanol is added to each sample and mixed

steps.title: Magnetic module is engaged and incubated for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Magnetic module is engaged and incubated for 5 minutes

steps.title: Supernatant is removed and disposed of...
steps.instruction: Supernatant is removed and disposed of in waste container, slot 4. Supernatant tips are disposed of here after third use

steps.title: 400 uL nuclease free water is...
steps.instruction: 400 uL nuclease free water is added to a single column, delay for 20 seconds, then NFW is removed. This is to ensure ethanol removal without premature elution. Elution buffer is immediately added to column. Repeated for all samples

steps.title: A specified volume of elution buffer...
steps.instruction: A specified volume of elution buffer is transferred to an awaiting plate in slot 3
